figures.caption: Fig. 1: Illustration of the proposed BCI-enabled immersive communication framework supported by SNN-driven PFL. A wireless edge server (WES) hosts immersive applications and delivers VR/AR experiences to K users. Each user is equipped with an integrated BCI-HMD that enables simultaneous immersive interaction and brain-signal acquisition. The acquired brain signals are processed locally by an SNN with sparse, event-driven spiking activity, enabling energy-efficient inference and continual personalization.
